sentences.arabic: دَفَعَتْ سَارَةُ ثَمَنَ الكِتَابِ بِنُقُودٍ مَعْدَنِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sara je platila cijenu knjige kovanim novcem.
sentences.translationEn: Sara paid the price of the book with coins.

sentences.arabic: عَدَّتِ القِطَعَ النَّقْدِيَّةَ بِبُطْءٍ أَمَامَ البَائِعِ.
sentences.translation: Polako je prebrojala kovanice pred prodavačem.
sentences.translationEn: She counted the coins slowly in front of the seller.

sentences.translation: Prodavač se nasmiješio i dao joj knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: The seller smiled and gave her the book.

sentences.translation: Sara je izašla sretna sa svojom novom knjigom.
sentences.translationEn: Sara left happy with her new book.
